subcodes.title: Words to a Persian visitor, spoken on 1913-05-17
subcodes.first_line: Be patient. Overlook the shortcomings of others. Don't mind the criticisms of anyone. Let thy heart be like unto a sea.
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
